The 2024 Paris Olympic Games has seen a number of firsts, especially for islands in the Caribbean Sea.聽 First, Julien Alfred won Saint Lucia芒聙聶s first ever Olympic medal when she won gold in the women芒聙聶s 100-meter final.

And then, Thea LaFond, won gold in the women芒聙聶s triple jump, a first too for the island of Dominica. An impressive achievement considering the island doesn芒聙聶t even have an athletics track.

CGTN芒聙聶s Dan Williams sat down with LaFond to talk about what her success could mean for the island.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
